text.title: Structured Logging as Code Examples
text.summary: End-to-end worked example illustrating the methodology against a realistic input.

example.title: FastAPI + OTel + Loki
example.note: structlog adapter emits JSON with ts/level/msg/service/env/request_id/trace_id; redaction wraps user.email -> sha256:..., card_number -> dropped, password|secret|token regex drops; OTel propagates trace through Celery; per-env config sets prod=INFO+1% DEBUG sample; CI fixture parses 12 sample lines + asserts redaction. Owner: ruslan@faion.net.

example.title: f-string logger
example.note: logger.info('user X.Y@gmail.com paid 39$ for plan_PRO'). After 30 days: 12 GDPR DSARs require log scrubbing; trace_id missing in 5/6 services; DEBUG enabled in prod after a bug bash and never removed; log bill x3.
